zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick於1696年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Alexander Kirkpatrick35歲，母親Chloe Coward31歲。他於1715年7月14日與Margaret Gregg在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆卡蒙利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1721年移民到英國蘇格蘭。他去世於1768年5月16日在美國賓夕法尼亞州切斯特韋斯特 諾廷加姆 堂史普享年72歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州道分帕堂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick于1696年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Alexander Kirkpatrick35岁，母亲Chloe Coward31岁。他于1715年7月14日与Margaret Gregg在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆卡蒙利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1721年移民到英国苏格兰。他去世于1768年5月16日在美国宾夕法尼亚州切斯特韋斯特 諾廷加姆 堂史普享年72岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州道分帕堂。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: Blain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Bláán, originally a byname, a diminutive form of blá ‘yellow’. This was the name of an early Celtic saint who lived in the 6th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick was born in 1696, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Kirkpatrick, was 35 and his mother, Chloe Coward, was 31. He married Margaret Gregg on 14 July 1715, in Carnmoney, County Antrim, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He immigrated to Scotland, United Kingdom in 1721. He died on 16 May 1768, in West Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 72, and was buried in Paxtang, Dauphin, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick est né en 1696, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Kirkpatrick, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Chloe Coward, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Gregg le 14 juillet 1715, à Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il a immigré au Écosse, Royaume-Uni en 1721. Il est décédé le 16 mai 1768, à West Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Paxtang, Dauphin, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick 1696 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Kirkpatrick 35 und seine Mutter Chloe Coward 31. Er hat am 14. Juli 1715 in Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irland Margaret Gregg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er ist 1721 nach Schottland, United Kingdom eingewandert. Er starb am 16. Mai 1768 im Alter von 72 Jahren in West Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Paxtang, Dauphin, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick è nato il nel 1696 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Kirkpatrick, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Chloe Coward, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Gregg il 14 luglio 1715, nel Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Immigrato nel Scozia, Regno Unito nel 1721. Morì il 16 maggio 1768, nel West Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Paxtang, Dauphin, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Blain Kirkpatrickが1696年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander Kirkpatrickは35歳，母Chloe Cowardは31歳であった。1715年7月14日にアイルランドコウントイ アントリムカーンモンエイでMargaret Greggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1721年にイギリススコットランドに移住した。彼は1768年5月16日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州チェスターウエスト ノッティンガム トウンシュイップで72歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ダウフィンプアクスタンにて埋葬された。

ko.County Antrim, Ireland or Pennsylvania,: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 티오가 덩 타운시프 앤트림
ko.West Nottingham Township, Chester, Penns: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 웨스트 노틴그함 타운시프
ko.Lancaster, Lancaster, Pennsylvania, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 랭커스터 랭커스터
ko.Easton, Northampton, Pennsylvania, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 노르섬프턴 이스트
ko.West Nottingham Township, Chester, Penns: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 웨스트 노틴그함 타운시프
ko.Mine Brook, Somerset, New Jersey, BCA: 미국 뉴저지 주 서머세트 마이인 브룩
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick(이)가 1696년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Kirkpatrick(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Chloe Coward(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1715년 7월 14일 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림 카른몬이에서 Margaret Gregg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1721년에 영국 스코틀랜드로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1768년 5월 16일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 웨스트 노틴그함 타운시프에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 도필 파스탠그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick nasceu em 1696, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Kirkpatrick, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Chloe Coward, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Gregg em 14 de julho de 1715, em Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Escócia, United Kingdom em 1721. Ele faleceu em 16 de maio de 1768, em West Nottingham Township, Chester, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Paxtang, Dauphin, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick родился в 1696 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Kirkpatrick было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Chloe Coward, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Gregg 14 июля 1715 г. в местности карнмоуни, коунти антрим, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в Шотландия, Великобритания в 1721 году. Он умер 16 мая 1768 г. в местности вест ноттингхам тоуншип, честир, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности пакстанг, дауфин, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick nació en 1696, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Kirkpatrick, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Chloe Coward, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret Gregg el 14 de julio de 1715, en Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Inmigró a Escocia, Reino Unido en 1721. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1768, en West Nottingham Township, Chester, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Paxtang, Dauphin, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
